description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the blurri/meteor-node Docker image with a mongo service and set METEOR_ALLOW_SUPERUSER=true. Add a global before_script that exports PATH, installs Yarn 0.16.1 via curl, configures Yarn cache to .yarn, and runs yarn install, and cache the directories node_modules, ~/.npm, ~/.meteor, ~/meteor and .yarn. Define stages test and deploy. In the test stage add an integration_tests job that runs only on develop and master branches and executes `yarn run test:integration`. Also add a spec_tests job that runs `yarn run test` and captures coverage using the regex `^Statements\s*:\s*([^%]+)`. In the deploy stage add a deploy_dev job that runs only on the master branch, with a before_script that installs openssh-client if missing, starts ssh-agent, adds $SSH_PRIVATE_KEY, configures SSH to skip host checking, updates apt, installs build-essential, installs node-gyp globally, and runs `npm install --production`; then the script changes to ./.deploy-prod and runs `../node_modules/.bin/mup setup` and `../node_modules/.bin/mup deploy` to deploy the Meteor app.
